features: 【Christmas Antlers Hair Clips】8Pcs lovely hair clips barrettes contain santa snowman reindeer to create Christmas atmosphere. X-mas hair clips perfect for Christmas and to wear to parties!

【Widely Occasion】Christmas Party Hair Clips Hairpin Christmas Gifts. Pretty hair pins set are ideal for Christmas party, weddings, birthdays, pageants, engagements, proms, parties, honeymoons, dates, graduations, banquets or any occasion you want to be more charming.

【High-quality materials】High-quality grosgrain ribbons are environmentally friendly materials that can be used safely, super soft, harmless and non-irritating to baby skin, making your girl feel comfortable. Strong and durable, it is easy to fix on the hair, thus saving the time of taking care of the baby girl's hairstyle.

【Perfect Gifts】these lovely Christmas barrettes are nice gifts for your girlfriends, sisters or others at birthday, Christmas, New Year and other holidays, especially for little girls, they will love the cute decorations
